title: adonis ambigua
intro: Adonis ambigua, also known as Adonis or False Hellebore, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Adonis ambigua include reducing fever, treating rheumatism, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne.
